{"query":"Palworld version 1.0 patch notes new pals breeding system dedicated server clustering Sun Reach sanctuary changes","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1615,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.thebiglead.com/palworld-1-0-patch-notes/","title":"Palworld 1.0 patch notes: Everything new in the official launch","content":"8 days ago — Now breeding Pals has a chance to produce a mutated egg, which will have higher stats and unique passive skills.
Palworld 1.0 patch notes: Everything new in the official launch
And finally is a big list of new weapons that span the entire tech tree.
Ryan has previously worked at ESPN, VGC, Sports Illustrated, The Sun, and more."},{"url":"https://supercraft.host/wiki/palworld/one_point_zero_update_guide/","title":"Palworld 1.0 Server Update Guide (July 10, 2026)","content":"Palworld 1.0 is out now: it launched July 10, 2026, marking the game's exit from Early Access.
Two things worth knowing going in: 1.0 is free for existing owners (the game stays $29.99), so every player on your server updates at no cost, and Palworld passed 40 million players ahead of launch.
Pocketpair has also dated the first paid DLC, "Dawn of the Palpagos," for July 30, 2026, so plan for a second content bump about three weeks after launch.
Alongside the new regions, the existing Palpagos Islands were overhauled: 72 new Pals (287 total) spread across the whole map, and wild spawn distribution changed - several Pals no longer sit at their old fixed farming spots, so pre-1.0 location guides will point your players at empty ground.
If your server sat near its memory ceiling before July 10, expect Sunreach and World Tree expeditions to push it over.
Server Clustering isn't a usable 1.0 feature yet.
Rent a Palworld dedicated server with Supercraft - instant setup, daily backups, five regions - and have your 1.0 world up before July 10."},{"url":"https://jeu.video/en/article/palworld-1-0-patch-notes","title":"Palworld 1.0 patch notes: 72 new Pals, Sunreach and the changes worth returning for | JEU.VIDEO","content":"The creature roster now reaches 287 Pals.
Pocketpair says the update adds 47 new Pals and 25 variants.
Palworld 1.0 patch notes: the biggest changes
Version 1.0 adds Sunreach, the World Tree, 72 Pals, new missions and new progression systems.
Pocketpair also lists overhauls for combat, Partner Skills, base building, multiplayer and graphics.","date":"5 days ago"},{"url":"https://games.gg/palworld/guides/palworld-1-0-all-major-changes-and-additions/","title":"Palworld 1.0 All Major Changes & Additions | GAMES.GG","content":"8 days ago — Palworld 1.0 adds 72 Pals, the Sunreach sky islands, World Tree story, and breeding mutations. Get every major change covered in one guide.
Palworld 1.0 is live with 72 new Pals, a sky island zone, story rework, and a breeding mutation system.
New side quests and Journal entries have been added throughout the world, giving you more reasons to poke around settlements and talk to NPCs beyond just farming resources.
The new levels above 65 are tied to Ancient Technology, so reaching the cap isn't just a number change."},{"url":"https://xgamingserver.com/blog/palworld-1-0-patch-notes/","title":"Palworld 1.0 Patch Notes: Everything New","content":"8 days ago — Palworld 1.0 headline changes 72 new Pals — 47 brand-new Pals plus 25 variants, bringing the roster to 287. Two new regions — the floating ...
Two new regions — the floating Sunreach islands and the endgame World Tree.
Two new mechanics — Mutations (breeding) and Awakening (Radiant Gems).
The World Tree — the towering endgame region at the heart of Palworld’s story, where you face your greatest challenge yet, gather Radiant Gems and Paloxite ore, and find the Ancient Civilization Relic.
Rebalanced Pal habitats so spawns feel more natural per region.
New ores Soralite (Sunreach only) and Paloxite (World Tree only), two new higher-tier Pal Spheres, and a cheaper Pal Sphere recipe (now just 1 Paldium Fragment).
Dedicated server optimizations — improved performance with many players, reduced save-corruption risk, better server list UI, an unstable-connection icon, and a server-address hiding mode for streamers.
Because 1.0 adds a bigger map, floating islands and offshore bases, save files are larger and there’s more concurrent activity — so CPU clock speed and fast NVMe storage matter more than ever."}]}
